ddls:
CREATE TABLE "checkbox_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property (e.g., state, size) */,
  "attribute" TEXT /* Attribute name used in the UI component (e.g., data-size) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Data type of the property (e.g., Boolean, String) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property is required */,
  "is_animatable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property can be animated */,
  "is_customizable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property can be customized by the user */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the property, if applicable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each value */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property that this value belongs to */,
  "value" TEXT /* Allowed value for the property (e.g., true, false) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the value */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the value is the default value for the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_values_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES checkbox_properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "themes" (
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theme */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the theme */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theme */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the theme is the default theme */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the theme was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the theme was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layouts" (
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layout */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the layout */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the layout */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the layout is the default layout */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the layout was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the layout was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "checkbox_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property (e.g., state, size) */,
  "value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the value for the property (e.g., true, false) */,
  "theme_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theme applied to the component */,
  "layout_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layout used for the component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component for easier identification */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component is visible */,
  "is_enabled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the component is enabled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the component was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the component was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkbox_components_layout_id FOREIGN KEY ("layout_id") REFERENCES layouts ("layout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkbox_components_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("value_id") REFERENCES property_values ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkbox_components_theme_id FOREIGN KEY ("theme_id") REFERENCES themes ("theme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkbox_components_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES checkbox_properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_defaults" (
  "default_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default value */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the default value for the property */,
  "is_override" INTEGER /* Indicates if the default value is overridden for the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_defaults_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES checkbox_properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_defaults_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("value_id") REFERENCES property_values ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_defaults_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES checkbox_components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics event */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who interacted with the component */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., click, hover) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date when the event occurred */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in milliseconds */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the application where the event occurred */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES checkbox_components ("component_id")
)
